explanations.1: The @test decorator marks this as a test case that the bats test runner will execute; the string in quotes is just the test's human-readable name.
explanations.2: The 'run' command executes the following command (echo "hello") and captures its output and exit code so you can check them in the lines below.
explanations.3: assert_output checks that the command's printed output matches exactly what you specified ("hello").
explanations.4: assert_success verifies that the command exited with a success code (0), meaning no error occurred.
